Package model

Class Player

java.lang.Object
model.Player
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, IPlayer
Direct Known Subclasses:
HumanPlayer, MachinePlayer
public class Player extends Object implements IPlayer, Serializable
Base class for players (human and machine).
